              def last_synced_at=(time)

                setting = Setting.find_or_initialize_by(key: KEY)

              def touch!

              def seconds_until_sync_allowed

              def format_review_duration(started_at, completed_at)
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            
              8
            

            
              
                
                  else: 5
                
              
                
                  then: 3
                
              
            

                return nil unless started_at && completed_at
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            
              5
            

            
              
            

                seconds = (completed_at - started_at).to_i
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            
              5
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
            

                if seconds < 60
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            
              1
            

            
              
                
                  else: 4
                
              
            

                  "#{seconds}s"
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            
              4
            

            
              
                
                  then: 2
                
              
            

                elsif seconds < 3600
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  minutes = seconds / 60
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  secs = seconds % 60
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            
              2
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                  secs > 0 ? "#{minutes}m #{secs}s" : "#{minutes}m"
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 2
                
              
            

                else
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  hours = seconds / 3600
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  minutes = (seconds % 3600) / 60
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            
              2
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                  minutes > 0 ? "#{hours}h #{minutes}m" : "#{hours}h"

    134. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135.

              def render_markdown(text)
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            
              19
            

            
              
                
                  then: 2
                
              
                
                  else: 17

    139. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            
              17
            

            
              
            

                renderer = rouge_html_renderer.new(hard_wrap: true)
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            
              17
            

            
              
            

                markdown = ::Redcarpet::Markdown.new(renderer,
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            
              
            

                  fenced_code_blocks: true,
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            
              
            

                  autolink: true,
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            
              
            

                  tables: true,
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            
              
            

                  strikethrough: true,
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            
              
            

                  lax_spacing: true,
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            
              
            

                  space_after_headers: true,
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            
              
            

                  no_intra_emphasis: true
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            
              
            

                )
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            
              17
            

            
              
            

                markdown.render(text).html_safe
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def render_code_block(code, language = nil)
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            
              5
            

            
              
                
                  then: 2
                
              
                
                  else: 3
                
              
            

                return "" if code.blank?
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                language ||= detect_language(code)
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                formatter = ::Rouge::Formatters::HTML.new
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                lexer = ::Rouge::Lexer.find_fancy(language, code) || ::Rouge::Lexers::PlainText.new
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                highlighted = formatter.format(lexer.lex(code))
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                %(<div class="code-block relative group">
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            
              
            

                  <div class="flex items-center justify-between bg-gray-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-t-lg">
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            
              
            

                    <span class="text-gray-400 text-xs font-mono">#{language}</span>
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            
              
            

                    <button type="button" class="copy-btn text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-xs flex items-center gap-1" data-controller="copy" data-action="click->copy#copy" data-copy-content-value="#{ERB::Util.html_escape(code)}">
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            
              
            

                      <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M8 16H6a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h8a2 2 0 012 2v2m-6 12h8a2 2 0 002-2v-8a2 2 0 00-2-2h-8a2 2 0 00-2 2v8a2 2 0 002 2z"></path></svg>
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            
              
            

                      Copy
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            
              
            

                    </button>
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            
              
            

                  </div>
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            
              
            

                  <pre class="highlight bg-gray-900 text-gray-100 p-4 rounded-b-lg overflow-x-auto text-sm m-0"><code class="language-#{language}">#{highlighted}</code></pre>
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            
              
            

                </div>).html_safe
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            
              
            

              end

              def normalize_output(raw_output)

    124.

              def standard_review_prompt
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            
              17
            

            
              
                
                  then: 16
                
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                skill_instruction = @skill ? "Run #{@skill} to analyze the changes." : "Analyze the code changes."
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            
              17
            

            
              
            

                <<~PROMPT
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            

            
              
            

                  Review PR ##{@pull_request.number}: #{@pull_request.title}
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            

            
              
            

                  #{@pull_request.description}
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT SCOPE CONSTRAINT: You must ONLY review code that was actually changed in this PR.
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Use `gh pr diff` or `git diff` to identify exactly which files and lines were modified
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Do NOT flag issues in pre-existing code that wasn't touched by this PR
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Do NOT review or comment on files that weren't modified in this PR
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Only flag issues on lines that were added or modified, not surrounding unchanged code
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            
              
            

                  Focus your review on:
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Code quality and best practices (only in changed code)
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Potential bugs or issues introduced by this PR
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Security concerns in the new/modified code
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Performance implications of the changes
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            
              
            

                  #{skill_instruction}
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            
              
            

                  After completing the review, you MUST output your findings as a JSON array wrapped in ```json code block.
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            
              
            

                  Each item in the array should have this exact structure:
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            
              
            

                  {
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            
              
            

                    "title": "Brief, actionable title of the issue (max 10 words)",
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            
              
            

                    "severity": "error" | "warning" | "info",
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            
              
            

                    "file": "path/to/file.ext",
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            
              
            

                    "lines": "10-20" or "10" or null,
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            
              
            

                    "comment": "Detailed description of the issue in markdown",
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            
              
            

                    "suggested_fix": "Code suggestion if applicable, or null"
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            
              
            

                  }
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT suggested_fix rules:
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Use `suggested_fix` ONLY for concrete replacement code/snippets that can be copied into source
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            
              
            

                  - If you only have advice/explanation (no code), put it in `comment` and set `suggested_fix` to null
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Do NOT put prose, rationale, or instructions in `suggested_fix`
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT: The "file" field MUST be the actual file path from the repository (e.g., "app/models/user.rb").
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            
              
            

                  - If you cannot determine the exact file path, use "N/A" instead of "unknown" or placeholder text
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Never include explanatory text like "unknown (ClassName)" in the file field
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            
              
            

                  - The file path should be relative to the repository root
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            
              
            

                  Example output format:
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            
              
            

                  ```json
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            
              
            

                  [
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            
              
            

                    {
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            
              
            

                      "severity": "warning",
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            
              
            

                      "file": "src/components/ItemList.tsx",
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            
              
            

                      "lines": "45-50",
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            
              
            

                      "comment": "Sequential awaits inside loop. For many items, this is slow.\\n\\n**Suggestion:** Use `Promise.all()` or batch operations.",
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            
              
            

                      "suggested_fix": "await Promise.all(items.map((item) => processItem(item)));"
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            
              
            

                    }
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            
              
            

                  ]
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            
              
            

                  ```
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT: Replace the example values above with actual data from the PR you are reviewing.
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT: Always wrap the JSON in ```json code fences. If no issues found, return an empty array: ```json\\n[]\\n```
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            
              
            

                PROMPT
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def swarm_review_prompt
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            
              5
            

            
              
            

                <<~PROMPT
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Deep Code Review - Multi-Agent Analysis
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            
              
            

                  You are orchestrating a comprehensive code review using 7 specialized reviewer agents. Your job is to:
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            
              
            

                  1. Invoke each specialized reviewer
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            
              
            

                  2. Collect all findings
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            
              
            

                  3. Consolidate by consensus and priority
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            
              
            

                  4. Return structured findings for automated UI mapping
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            
              
            

                  ## Target for Review
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            
              
            

                  PR ##{@pull_request.number}: #{@pull_request.title}
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            
              
            

                  #{@pull_request.description}
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            
              
            

                  Review the changes in this PR. Use `gh pr diff` or `git diff` to identify exactly which files and lines were modified.
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            
              
            

                  ## Step 1: Invoke Specialized Reviewers
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            
              
            

                  Call each of these 7 specialized reviewers to analyze the code using the Task tool with parallel agents:
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            
              
            

                  1. **Security Reviewer** - Analyze for security vulnerabilities (OWASP, auth, secrets, etc.)
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            
              
            

                  2. **Data Consistency Reviewer** - Detect data mismatches, inconsistencies across data sources, and calculation discrepancies
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            
              
            

                  3. **Code Smell Reviewer** - Detect code smells and clean code violations
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            
              
            

                  4. **Design Pattern Reviewer** - Review architecture and design patterns (SOLID, anti-patterns)
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            
              
            

                  5. **Performance Reviewer** - Identify performance issues and optimization opportunities
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            
              
            

                  6. **Maintainability Reviewer** - Assess maintainability, readability, and technical debt
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            
              
            

                  7. **Regression Reviewer** - Detect behavioral regressions, ensuring code changes don't break existing functionality
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            
              
            

                  For each reviewer, ask them to analyze the target code and return their findings in the specified format.
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            
              
            

                  ## Step 2: Consolidate Findings
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            
              
            

                  After receiving all reviews, consolidate the findings:
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            
              
            

                  ### Consensus Rules
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            
              
            

                  - **CRITICAL**: Issues flagged as CRITICAL by ANY reviewer
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            
              
            

                  - **HIGH**: Issues flagged as HIGH by 2+ reviewers OR HIGH by 1 reviewer + related findings
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            
              
            

                  - **MEDIUM**: Issues flagged by 2+ reviewers at any level
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            
              
            

                  - **LOW**: Single reviewer findings not meeting above criteria
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            
              
            

                  ### Deduplication
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Merge similar issues across reviewers
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Note when multiple reviewers identified the same issue (strengthens priority)
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Combine recommendations from different perspectives
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            
              
            

                  ## Step 3: Return Structured Output
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            
              
            

                  After consolidation, you MUST output your findings as a JSON array wrapped in ```json code block.
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            
              
            

                  Each item in the array should have this exact structure:
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            
              
            

                  {
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            
              
            

                    "title": "Brief, actionable title of the issue (max 10 words)",
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            
              
            

                    "severity": "error" | "warning" | "info",
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            
              
            

                    "file": "path/to/file.ext",
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            
              
            

                    "lines": "10-20" or "10" or null,
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            

            
              
            

                    "comment": "Detailed description of the issue in markdown",
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            
              
            

                    "suggested_fix": "Code suggestion if applicable, or null"
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            
              
            

                  }
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT suggested_fix rules:
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Use `suggested_fix` ONLY for concrete replacement code/snippets that can be copied into source
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            
              
            

                  - If you only have advice/explanation (no code), put it in `comment` and set `suggested_fix` to null
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Do NOT put prose, rationale, or instructions in `suggested_fix`
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            
              
            

                  IMPORTANT: The "file" field MUST be the actual file path from the repository.
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            
              
            

                  - If you cannot determine the exact file path, use "N/A"
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Never include explanatory text like "unknown (ClassName)" in the file field
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            
              
            

                  If no issues are found, return:
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            
              
            

                  ```json
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            
              
            

                  []
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            
              
            

                  ```
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            
              
            

                  ## Important Notes
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Be thorough but avoid false positives
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Prioritize real issues over theoretical concerns
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            
              
            

                  - Include enough context for another agent to implement fixes
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            
              
            

                  - The report should be actionable, not just informational
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            
              
            

                PROMPT
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            
              
            

            end

              def run_gh_command(*args, timeout: nil)

    132. 
            
              2

      133.

              2

      134.

                if timeout
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                  stdout, stderr, status = Open3.capture3("gh", *args, **options, timeout: timeout)
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                else
          
      138.

              1
            

            
              
            

                  stdout, stderr, status = Open3.capture3("gh", *args, **options)

    139. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            
              2

      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                stdout
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142.

    143.

    144. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def remove_stale_prs(fetched_prs)
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            
              
            

                # Only remove PRs that no longer exist on GitHub (closed/merged)
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            
              
            

                # Preserve user-set review_status and review tasks
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            
              4
            

            
              
                
                  else: 3
                
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
            

                return unless @repo_path.present?
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149.

      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151.

      153.

              2

      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                                .map { |pr| pr[:github_id] }
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            
              
            

                                .to_set
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            
              
            

                # Find PRs in database for this repo that weren't in the fetch
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                stale_prs = PullRequest.where(repo_owner: repo_info[:owner], repo_name: repo_info[:name])
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            
              
            

                                       .where.not(github_id: fetched_ids)
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161.

      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            
              2
            

            
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
                
                  then: 1

      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                stale_count = stale_prs.count
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                Rails.logger.info "Removing #{stale_count} stale PR(s) from #{repo_info[:owner]}/#{repo_info[:name]}"
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                stale_prs.update_all(deleted_at: Time.current, updated_at: Time.current)
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                Rails.logger.info "Successfully soft-deleted #{stale_count} stale PR(s)"
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170.

              def get_repo_info
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            
              8
            

            
              
            

                validated_path = PathValidator.validate(@repo_path)
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            
              8
            

            
              
                
                  else: 6

      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174.

    175.

      176.

              6
            

            
              
            

                remote, status = Open3.capture2("git", "-C", validated_path, "remote", "get-url", "origin")
          
      177.

      182.

      183.

              3
            

            
              
                
                  then: 2
                
              
            

                if remote =~ %r{github\.com[:/]([^/]+)/([^/]+?)(?:\.git)?$}
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  { owner: $1, name: $2 }
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                else

              def fetch_pr_list(*args, review_status:)

                {
          
      200.

                  prs: parse_pr_data(data, review_status),
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            
              
            

                  complete: data.size < PR_FETCH_LIMIT
          
      202.

      203.

    204. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def parse_pr_payload(json)
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            
              8
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
                
                  else: 7

      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            
              7

      209.

              def parse_pr_data(data, review_status)
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            
              8
            

            
              
            

                data.map do |pr|
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            
              
            

                  # Extract repo info from URL: https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/123
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            
              6
            

            
              
            

                  url_parts = pr["url"].to_s.match(%r{github\.com/([^/]+)/([^/]+)/pull/})
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            
              
            

                  {
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            
              6
            

            
              
            

                    github_id: extract_github_id(pr["url"]),
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            
              
            

                    number: pr["number"],
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            
              
            

                    title: pr["title"],
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            
              
            

                    description: pr["body"],
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            
              
            

                    url: pr["url"],
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 5
                
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                    repo_owner: url_parts&.[](1) || pr.dig("headRepositoryOwner", "login"),
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 5
                
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                    repo_name: url_parts&.[](2),
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            
              
            

                    author: pr.dig("author", "login"),
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            
              
            

                    author_avatar: pr.dig("author", "avatarUrl"),
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            
              
            

                    created_at_github: pr["createdAt"],
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            
              
            

                    updated_at_github: pr["updatedAt"],
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            
              
            

                    review_status: review_status
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            
              
            

                  }
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def should_reconcile_stale_prs?(fetched_prs)
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            
              3
            

            
              
                
                  else: 3
                
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
            

                return false unless @repo_path.present?
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            
              3
            

            
              
                
                  then: 2
                
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                return false if Setting.only_requested_reviews?
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                fetched_prs[:open_prs_complete] == true
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def extract_github_id(url)
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            
              10
            

            
              
            

                url = url.to_s
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            
              
            

                # Extract PR number and repo from URL for a stable unique ID
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            
              
            

                # URL format: https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/123
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            
              10
            

            
              
            

                if url =~ %r{github\.com/([^/]+)/([^/]+)/pull/(\d+)}
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            
              
                
                  then: 8
                
              
            

                  # Create stable hash from owner/repo/number
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            
              8
            

            
              
            

                  Digest::SHA256.hexdigest("#{$1}/#{$2}/#{$3}").to_i(16) % (2**62)
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            
              
            

                else
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            
              
                
                  else: 2
                
              
            

                  # Fallback: use Digest for stable hashing
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  Digest::SHA256.hexdigest(url).to_i(16) % (2**62)
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def sync_prs(prs, default_review_status)
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            
              8
            

            
              
            

                prs.each do |pr_data|
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
            

                  pr = PullRequest.unscoped.find_or_initialize_by(github_id: pr_data[:github_id])
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
            

                  synced_status = pr_data[:review_status] || default_review_status
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
            

                  attrs = pr_data.dup
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
            

                  attrs[:archived] = false
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
            

                  attrs[:deleted_at] = nil
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            
              
            

                  # reviewed_by_me requires a local ReviewTask; keep external reviews visible in pending.
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
                
                  else: 1003
                
              
            

                  if synced_status == "reviewed_by_me" && pr.review_task.blank?
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    attrs[:review_status] = "pending_review"
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    synced_status = "pending_review"
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            
              
            

                  end
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            
              1004
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
            

                  if should_reset_for_rerequest?(pr, synced_status)
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                    reset_for_rerequest!(pr)
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            
              1
            

            
              
                
                  else: 1003
                
              
            

                    attrs[:review_status] = "pending_review"
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            
              1003
            

            
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
                
                  else: 1003

    119. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                review_event = event || "COMMENT"
          
      120.

              3
            

            
              
                
                  then: 2
                
              
            

                review_body = if review_event == "APPROVE" && summary.blank?
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            
              2
            

            
              
            

                  nil
          
      122.

                  else: 1
                
              
            

                else
          
      123.

      124.

                end
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125.

    126.

              end
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128.

              5

                  emoji = severity_emoji(severity)
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            
              10
            

            
              
            

                  parts << "- #{emoji} **#{severity.capitalize}**: #{count}"

    141. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      142.

    146. 
            
              5

    148.

              def count_by_severity(comments)

                comments.group_by(&:severity).transform_values(&:count)

      152.

              def severity_emoji(severity)
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            
              16
            

            
              
                
                  when: 5
                
              
            

                case severity
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            
              5
            

            
              
                
                  when: 1
                
              
            

                when "critical" then ":rotating_light:"
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            
              1
            

            
              
                
                  when: 5
                
              
            

                when "major" then ":warning:"
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            
              5
            

            
              
                
                  when: 3
                
              
            

                when "minor" then ":information_source:"
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            
              3
            

            
              
                
                  when: 1
                
              
            

                when "suggestion" then ":bulb:"
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            
              1
            

            
              
                
                  else: 1
                
              
            

                when "nitpick" then ":mag:"
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                else ":speech_balloon:"
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162.

    163.

                if comments.any? { |c| c.critical? || c.major? }

      191.

              11
            

            
              
            

                  payload[:side] = "RIGHT" # Comment on the new version of the file
          
      192.

                end

                Rails.logger.info(
          
      251.

              3

      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            
              3
            

            
              
            

                  "api",
          
      273.

                  "--method", method,
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274.

      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            

            
              
            

                  "-H", "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28",
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            

            
              
            

                  endpoint,
          
      277. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    277.

      278. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    278. 
            

            
              
            

                ]

    279. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      280. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    280. 
            
              3

      281. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    281. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      282. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    282. 
            
              3
            

            
              
                
                  else: 3
                
              
                
                  then: 0
                
              
            

                unless status.success?
          
      283. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    283. 
            

            
              
            

                  Rails.logger.error("GithubReviewSubmitter: API error - #{stderr}")
          
      284. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    284. 
            

            
              
            

                  raise parse_api_error(stderr, stdout)
          
      285. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    285. 
            

            
              
            

                end
          
      286. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    286. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      287. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    287. 
            
              3
            

            
              
                
                  then: 1
                
              
                
                  else: 2
                
              
            

                stdout.strip.empty? ? {} : JSON.parse(stdout)
          
      288. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    288. 
            

            
              
            

              rescue JSON::ParserError => e
          
      289. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    289. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                Rails.logger.error("GithubReviewSubmitter: Failed to parse response - #{e.message}")
          
      290. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    290. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

                raise Error, "Failed to parse GitHub API response: #{e.message}"
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            

            
              
            

              end
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            

            
              
            

            
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            

            
              
            

              # Parse API error response and return appropriate error class
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            
              1
            

            
              
            

              def parse_api_error(stderr, stdout = nil)
          
      295.
